tools.description: List all available devices. This includes both physical mobile devices and mobile simulators and emulators. It returns both Android and iOS devices.
tools.name: mobile_list_available_devices
tools.title: List Devices

tools.description: List devices available in the remote fleet
tools.name: mobile_list_remote_devices
tools.title: List Remote Devices

tools.description: Reserve a device from the remote fleet

platform.description: The platform to allocate a device for

tools.name: mobile_allocate_remote_device
tools.title: Allocate Remote Device

tools.description: Release a device back to the remote fleet

device.description: The device identifier to release back to the remote fleet

tools.name: mobile_release_remote_device
tools.title: Release Remote Device

tools.description: List all the installed apps on the device

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

tools.name: mobile_list_apps
tools.title: List Apps

tools.description: Launch an app on mobile device. Use this to open a specific app. You can find the package name of the app by calling list_apps_on_device.

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

locale.description: Comma-separated BCP 47 locale tags to launch the app with (e.g., fr-FR,en-GB)

packageName.description: The package name of the app to launch

tools.name: mobile_launch_app
tools.title: Launch App

tools.description: Stop and terminate an app on mobile device

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

packageName.description: The package name of the app to terminate

tools.name: mobile_terminate_app
tools.title: Terminate App

tools.description: Install an app on mobile device

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

path.description: The path to the app file to install. For iOS simulators, provide a .zip file or a .app directory. For Android provide an .apk file. For iOS real devices provide an .ipa file

tools.name: mobile_install_app
tools.title: Install App

tools.description: Uninstall an app from mobile device

bundle_id.description: Bundle identifier (iOS) or package name (Android) of the app to be uninstalled

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

tools.name: mobile_uninstall_app
tools.title: Uninstall App

tools.description: Get the screen size of the mobile device in pixels

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

tools.name: mobile_get_screen_size
tools.title: Get Screen Size

tools.description: Click on the screen at given x,y coordinates. If clicking on an element, use the list_elements_on_screen tool to find the coordinates.

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

x.description: The x coordinate to click on the screen, in pixels

y.description: The y coordinate to click on the screen, in pixels

tools.name: mobile_click_on_screen_at_coordinates
tools.title: Click Screen

tools.description: Double-tap on the screen at given x,y coordinates.

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

x.description: The x coordinate to double-tap, in pixels

y.description: The y coordinate to double-tap, in pixels

tools.name: mobile_double_tap_on_screen
tools.title: Double Tap Screen

tools.description: Long press on the screen at given x,y coordinates. If long pressing on an element, use the list_elements_on_screen tool to find the coordinates.

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

duration.description: Duration of the long press in milliseconds. Defaults to 500ms.

x.description: The x coordinate to long press on the screen, in pixels

y.description: The y coordinate to long press on the screen, in pixels

tools.name: mobile_long_press_on_screen_at_coordinates
tools.title: Long Press Screen

tools.description: List elements on screen and their coordinates, with display text or accessibility label. Do not cache this result.

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

tools.name: mobile_list_elements_on_screen
tools.title: List Screen Elements

tools.description: Press a button on device

button.description: The button to press. Supported buttons: BACK (android only), HOME, VOLUME_UP, VOLUME_DOWN, ENTER, DPAD_CENTER (android tv only), DPAD_UP (android tv only), DPAD_DOWN (android tv only), DPAD_LEFT (android tv only), DPAD_RIGHT (android tv only)

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

tools.name: mobile_press_button
tools.title: Press Button

tools.description: Open a URL in browser on device

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

tools.name: mobile_open_url
tools.title: Open URL

tools.description: Swipe on the screen

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

distance.description: The distance to swipe in pixels. Defaults to 400 pixels for iOS or 30% of screen dimension for Android

x.description: The x coordinate to start the swipe from, in pixels. If not provided, uses center of screen

y.description: The y coordinate to start the swipe from, in pixels. If not provided, uses center of screen

tools.name: mobile_swipe_on_screen
tools.title: Swipe Screen

tools.description: Type text into the focused element

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

submit.description: Whether to submit the text. If true, the text will be submitted as if the user pressed the enter key.

tools.name: mobile_type_keys
tools.title: Type Text

tools.description: Save a screenshot of the mobile device to a file

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

saveTo.description: The path to save the screenshot to. Filename must end with .png, .jpg, or .jpeg

tools.name: mobile_save_screenshot
tools.title: Save Screenshot

tools.description: Take a screenshot of the mobile device. Use this to understand what's on screen, if you need to press an element that is available through view hierarchy then you must list elements on screen instead. Do not cache this result.

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

tools.name: mobile_take_screenshot
tools.title: Take Screenshot

tools.description: Change the screen orientation of the device

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

tools.name: mobile_set_orientation
tools.title: Set Orientation

tools.description: Get the current screen orientation of the device

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

tools.name: mobile_get_orientation
tools.title: Get Orientation

tools.description: Start recording the screen of a mobile device. The recording runs in the background until stopped with mobile_stop_screen_recording. Returns the path where the recording will be saved.

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

output.description: The file path to save the recording to. Filename must end with .mp4. If not provided, a temporary path will be used.

timeLimit.description: Maximum recording duration in seconds. The recording will stop automatically after this time.

tools.name: mobile_start_screen_recording
tools.title: Start Screen Recording

tools.description: Stop an active screen recording on a mobile device. Returns the file path, size, and approximate duration of the recording.

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

tools.name: mobile_stop_screen_recording
tools.title: Stop Screen Recording

tools.description: List crash reports available on the device

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

tools.name: mobile_list_crashes
tools.title: List Crash Reports

tools.description: Get the full content of a crash report by its ID. Use mobile_list_crashes to find available crash IDs.

device.description: The device identifier to use. Use mobile_list_available_devices to find which devices are available to you.

id.description: The crash report ID to retrieve

tools.name: mobile_get_crash
tools.title: Get Crash Report
